title: Siciliana Apricot Cassata
description: A Sicilian-inspired dessert featuring a moist cassata cake, topped with sweet apricots in a spicy syrup.
instructions: Prepare the cassata cake according to package instructions.
In a saucepan, combine sugar, water, tra, neapolitan, x, and spicy. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add dried apricots to the saucepan and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Let the apricot syrup cool to room temperature.
Once the cassata cake is cool, slice it in half horizontally.
Drizzle the apricot syrup over the bottom half of the cake.
Top with the top half of the cake.
Dust with powdered sugar, if desired.
